scripts.backend:run: cd backend && poetry run python -m swimming_best
scripts.backend:run:uv: cd backend && uv run python -m swimming_best
scripts.backend:lint: cd backend && uv run ruff check swimming_best tests
scripts.backend:test: cd backend && uv run python -m pytest tests -q
scripts.backend:test:uv: cd backend && uv run python -m pytest tests -q
scripts.check: npm run frontend:lint && npm run frontend:test && npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:lint && npm run backend:test
